title: Dashboard time tracking
excerpt:
Hello, 
We’re facing a real frustration since we can’t get our time tracking at the dashboard since we track time in our sub items!

posts.author: Yariv (Yariv Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
We’re facing a real frustration since we can’t get our time tracking at the dashboard since we track time in our sub items!

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Yariv Analytics & Reports by Screenful allows reporting time tracking data both on top level items and subitems. You can learn more from this guide: Creating charts based on time tracking data - Screenful Guide for monday.com

The charts you create in Screenful can be placed on Monday dashboards or scheduled to be sent via email.

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also running into the same problem
